_note: Manually compiled from each service's public nutrition pages, help centers, and published meal plans. Updated June 2026. Sources: individual service websites.

factor.source: factor75.com/plans — 4-meal plan $11/meal, 18-meal plan $6.99/meal. Nutrition from their published meal cards (protein-focused line averages ~41g protein).
factor.notes: Chef-prepared, no cooking required. Protein-plus meals skew higher (~50g).

hellofresh.source: hellofresh.com/plans — 2-person 2-meal plan from $13.99/meal, 4-person 4-meal from $7.99/meal. Nutrition from their public recipe pages.
hellofresh.notes: Meal kits (you cook). Lower protein than prepared-meal services by nature.

trifecta.source: trifectanutrition.com — 5-meal classic plan from $14.48/meal, free shipping. Nutrition from their published macro tracking (USDA certified organic).
trifecta.notes: USDA organic. Macro-tracking focused, calorie-controlled portions.

sunbasket.source: sunbasket.com — Fresh & Ready meals from $10.99/meal + $9.99 shipping. Nutrition from their published nutrition labels (printed on packaging, available online).
sunbasket.notes: Mix of meal kits and Fresh & Ready prepared meals. USDA organic ingredients.

greenchef.source: greenchef.com/plans — Keto+Paleo plan from $12.99/meal + $9.99 shipping. Nutrition from their published recipe cards (keto/paleo plans skew high protein, lower carb).
greenchef.avg_carbs_g_note: Keto plan avg ~20g carbs; Mediterranean avg ~45g. Blended figure used.
greenchef.notes: USDA organic. Part of HelloFresh family. Strong keto/paleo options drive protein higher.

bistromd.source: bistromd.com — 5-day plan (3 meals/day) from $9.99/meal + $19.95 shipping. Nutrition from their published meal database (dietitian-designed, calorie-controlled).
bistromd.notes: Doctor-designed. Lower calorie targets (1,200-1,400 cal/day programs). High shipping cost is major all-in factor.
